use_cases: Feature cards that smoothly reveal additional content on hover with animated height transitions
Interactive product or service cards in e-commerce and SaaS interfaces
Expandable content sections with progressive disclosure patterns
Portfolio or showcase grids with hover-activated detail reveals
Dashboard widgets and info cards with animated content expansion
ai_summary: Cult UI Shift Card is an interactive card component that smoothly reveals hidden content when hovered or tapped. Built with framer-motion, it features animated height transitions and opacity changes for the middle content area. The component includes touch support and mouse event handlers, making it suitable for both desktop and mobile platforms. Ideal for SaaS and e-commerce interfaces requiring progressive disclosure patterns with polished micro-interactions.
